Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So for lunch, I had a melon-pan, then a katsu sandwich...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Then an age-pan, a kani-pan, a yakisoba-pan, apple strudel... another age-pan...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Argh... Urp! I... I think that might've been... too many carbs![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Today, a girl in my class asked me, "Who's that cute guy you went to Umiushi with?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 116 3 25 25}She wanted me to introduce you two so you could eat lunch together... without me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Girls always go for guys like you... or my little brother. I guess looks really are everything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 116 0 25 25}But once we're dead, we'll all just be bones. You can't tell a handsome skeleton from an ugly one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Arrgh, not again! Why do my memories make me so damn hungry!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Hey, waiter! Another tonkatsu special![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}While we wait for the food, let me share a little senryu poem I wrote.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 116 1 25 25}He who cuts you is no friend,[n]But he who katsu you,[n]Flavor until the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Whew... That was way too close. If that toilet was just a bit further away... Ohhhh, boy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Hey, don't you know who I am? I'm the Gourmet King. I can handle way more than any average stomach.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}In case you haven't noticed by now, I usually always have room for fried food.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Everything's good and normal over here. Except for my weight, that is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}...Ah! The Gourmet King shouldn't say things like that. I didn't mean to be so crass![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I mean, who wants to talk about toilets while they're eating? Gah, I keep saying "toilet"! Sorry, sorry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can tell Suemitsu's trying[n]to be considerate of me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Okay, enough of that! Let's shovel that food down![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}We have to eat every chance we get! Because once we're dead, all we'll be eating is dust![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}You know, just like my little brother![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After eating with Suemitsu,[n]I went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
